# USSP Inc. (US Software Professionals Inc.)

> USSP is a technology and staffing company established in 2003, headquartered in Chicago, IL. With over 20 years of experience, USSP delivers IT staffing, healthcare staffing, technology consulting, and software development services to Fortune 500 companies, government agencies, and healthcare organizations.

## Company Overview

- **Full Name:** US Software Professionals Inc. (USSP)
- **Founded:** January 23, 2003
- **Headquarters:** 875 N Michigan Ave, Suite 3100, Chicago, IL 60614
- **Phone:** +1-(312) 546-4306
- **Fax:** +1-(312) 253-2026
- **Website:** https://www.ussp.co
- **Offices:** Chicago (HQ), India, Canada

## Services

### IT Services
- Recruitment Services & Staff Augmentation
- Solution Delivery (Oracle ERP, AWS, Azure, Mobile, UX)
- Product Development (Lean Startup methodology)
- Custom Training (Oracle, Mobile, Cloud, Connected Products)
- Data Analytics & Artificial Intelligence
- IoT + Cloud + Mobile Solutions
- Technology Advisory & Agile Transformation
- Enterprise Architecture & Portfolio Management

### Healthcare Staffing
- International nurse recruitment (RNs, PTs, OTs)
- Immigration & licensure support
- NCLEX-RN preparation
- Cultural transition programs
- Direct placement and travel nursing
- Healthcare organization staffing solutions

### Blockchain Services
- Blockchain consulting and advisory
- dApp development, NFT Marketplace, Smart Contracts
- Asset tokenization and wallet development
- Node development and staking pool management
- Platforms: Ethereum, Solana, Corda, Hyperledger Fabric

### Small Business Solutions
- Website and branding
- Email and collaboration (Google Workspace, Microsoft 365)
- CRM and sales/marketing automation
- Data backup and recovery
- Finance and accounting software
- Human resources management
- Help desk and customer service
- Custom business applications

### AI Transformation Services
- End-to-end AI adoption for enterprises and government agencies
- Four-phase framework: Assess, Architect, Accelerate, Staff
- AI readiness assessment with quantified readiness scoring
- AI strategy and integration architecture design
- Workforce training powered by 12-module AI & ML curriculum
- AI talent staffing and augmentation (AI/ML engineers, data scientists)
- Available to Illinois state agencies through TOPS Category Two contract
- One of the few firms offering assessment, strategy, training, AND staffing

### AI Training
- 12-module AI & Machine Learning curriculum for teams and professionals
- Powers the "Accelerate" phase of USSP's AI Transformation framework
- Topics: LLMs, NLP, computer vision, MLOps, AI agents, prompt engineering, AI security

### Edge AI & Computer Vision (VionOS.ai)
- On-premises Edge AI platform for facility safety and operational intelligence
- Anonymous person tracking, zone occupancy monitoring, real-time alerts
- No facial recognition, no cloud, no PII — fully BIPA compliant
- Runs on NVIDIA Jetson Orin edge devices with existing IP cameras (RTSP)
- Anonymous Person Tokens (SHA-256, 4-hour TTL) for tracking without identification
- Industries: corrections, healthcare, education, manufacturing, government, entertainment
- Available to Illinois state agencies through TOPS Category Two (CMT4599470)
- Core capabilities: safety monitoring, operations intelligence, compliance & audit

## Certifications

- **MBE** — Minority Business Enterprise (Illinois BEP Certified)
- **WBE** — Women Business Enterprise (Illinois BEP Certified)
- **DBE** — Disadvantaged Business Enterprise (Illinois DOT Certified)

## Government Contracts

### TOPS Category Two (Applications)
- **Contract:** Technology Operations Professional Services (TOPS)
- **Role:** Authorized subvendor to Krasan Consulting Services (Primary Awardee)
- **Issuing Agency:** Illinois Department of Innovation & Technology (DoIT)
- **BidBuy #:** P-59947
- **Contract #:** CMT4599470
- **Type:** Indefinite Quantity JPMC (Joint Purchase Master Contract)
- **Available Through:** February 2034
- **Eligible Users:** All Illinois state agencies, boards, commissions, governmental units, and qualified not-for-profit agencies
- **Services:** Software programming, custom computer services, software consulting, installation services, business management consulting, IT consulting

## Careers & Applications
- USSP accepts job applications online at https://www.ussp.co/careers
- Applicants sign in with LinkedIn, provide their phone number, upload a resume (PDF, DOC, or DOCX), and consent to SMS communications (TCPA-compliant)
- After applying, candidates can opt in to job alert notifications and follow USSP on LinkedIn
- USSP invests in every team member through its 12-module AI & Machine Learning training program
- Continuous workforce development: AI, cloud, enterprise architecture, and cross-industry project exposure
- Open positions: Senior Software Engineers, Full-Stack Developers, DevOps Engineers, QA Engineers, IT Consultants, Solution Architects, Business Analysts, Project Managers, Data Analysts, AI/ML Engineers

## Core Values
Integrity, Innovation, Respect, Accountability, and Excellence

## Contact
- **General:** accounts@ussoftwarepro.com
- **Healthcare:** medicalstaffing@ussp.co
- **Hours:** Mon-Fri 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM

## Context-First AI Platform & Portfolio

USSP's Context-First AI platform ensures AI agents always have trusted, current business context. Data carries TTL (time-to-live) and trust scores via source tagging — so agents know what's fresh, what's stale, and what to trust. Context evolves automatically as business data changes. MCP (Model Context Protocol) ready. Available as managed services for small and medium businesses, or as an enterprise framework.

### Platform Capabilities
- 34+ pre-built data connectors with source tagging
- TTL (time-to-live) and trust scoring on every data point
- Automatic context evolution as data changes
- MCP (Model Context Protocol) integration for any AI agent
- Framework-agnostic: CrewAI, LangGraph, Claude, OpenAI, custom
- Semantic knowledge graph for full business context

### Business Intelligence & Analytics
- Unified Communications Intelligence Platform — AI-powered communications integrating calls, SMS, CRM, and POS data with campaign generation, AI coaching, and real-time dashboards
- Executive Command Center — Unified executive dashboard with real-time KPIs, cross-functional insights, P&L forecasting, budget builder, and multi-scenario analysis

### Marketing & Customer Engagement
- Marketing Automation Suite — AI campaign management with customer segmentation, SMS automation, AI copywriting, and influencer relationship management
- Competitive Intelligence Platform — Automated competitor monitoring for pricing, events, reviews, and market positioning

### Operations & Facility Management
- Digital Twin (3D Facility Simulator) — Real-time guest flow simulation, zone occupancy, queue prediction, and revenue-per-zone modeling
- Staffing Optimizer — Demand-based staffing forecasts, labor cost optimization, and scheduling integration

### Growth & Strategy
- Market Analysis & Site Selection — TAM sizing by ZIP code, drive-time mapping, census demographics, and competitive density scoring
- Acquisition Scoring Engine — Multi-site benchmarking, opportunity scoring (0-100), fair value estimation for PE firms

### AI & Automation
- Managed Data Intelligence Platform — The foundation of Context-First AI. Connect/Trust/Evolve with 34+ connectors, TTL and trust scoring, MCP integration, and semantic knowledge graph
- AI Workflow Engine — Configurable AI agent workflows for marketing analysis, report generation, and operational insights

### Partners
- VersaQuant (https://www.versaquant.com) - Intelligent investing simplified
- SenseMyForm (https://www.sensemyform.com) - Improve your running form
